channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why the Biden administration is proposing new rules for exporting AI chips
item.description: The Biden administration is proposing a new framework for the exporting of the advanced computer chips used to develop artificial intelligence, an attempt to balance national security concerns about the technology with the economic interests of producers and other countries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: ClickUp CEO Zeb Evans on why workplaces will be using fewer platforms in the future
item.description: If your team subscribes to 10 different software tools, you’re not alone in wrestling with the overwhelming sprawl of productivity apps. Entrepreneurs have taken notice.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: How to stop doomscrolling and get your motivation back
item.description: There are certain social media rules we can all agree on: Ghosting a conversation is impolite, and replying “k” to a text is the equivalent of a backhand slap (violent, wrong, and rude).
item.dc:creator: Delia Cai, Fast Company

item.title: How to watch Diddy: The Making of a Bad Boy online from anywhere – stream Sean Combs documentary
item.description: The downfall of a big star, as told by those close to him – here's how to watch Diddy: The Making of a Bad Boy online no matter where in the world you are.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 9 up-and-coming tech startups with 150+ remote jobs to fill
item.description: Looking for a great new job, and want to work from anywhere? While tech giants are pushing for five-days-a-week office returns, these nine growing startups are doubling down on distributed teams. From AI to soda pop, here’s where the future of work meets the next wave of innovation.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: AI might end up creating more jobs than it ends - and these jobs in particular should be safest
item.description: World Economic Forum acknowledges artificial intelligence will displace workers, but the end result is net job creation.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The OnePlus Open 2 tipped to be the thinnest foldable yet – with a new titanium build
item.description: New leaks around the second foldable from OnePlus suggest it could be the best phone of this type yet.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 4 ways Apple should upgrade its privacy and security game in 2025
item.description: Every year, Apple adds additional privacy features that make its products the most secure in the world. Most recently, in iOS 18, Apple added the ability to limit Contacts access to only the select connections you choose.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Disney, Warner Bros., Fox kill streamed sports joint venture
item.description: Three of the nation's largest broadcast media companies have scrapped plans to launch a joint direct-to-consumer streaming platform for live sports, the group announced Friday. Warner Bros. Discovery, Fox Corp.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: H-1B: Silicon Valley’s favorite foreign-worker visa under attack, while Trump, Musk offer support
item.description: The schism in MAGA raised questions about the fate in the second Trump era of a visa seen in Silicon Valley as key to the technology industry's innovation and success. It comes at a time when the tech industry has gained unprecedented proximity to U.S. levers of power.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: More than 4% PC shipment growth predicted for 2025, but not for what you expect, says IDC
item.description: PC sales certainly weren’t going gangbusters in 2024: They only grew a paltry 1% over 2023. According to new figures from IDC, vendors shipped 262.7 million PCs in 2024. But things did pick up a bit in Q4 2024: Shipments grew 1.8% over the prior year, reaching 68.9 million.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google, Boeing join growing list of companies donating to Trump's inauguration
item.description: Google and Boeing have each given $1 million to President-elect Trump’s inaugural committee, joining a growing list of major corporations supporting the Jan. 20 event. “Google is pleased to support the 2025 inauguration, with a livestream on YouTube and a direct link on our homepage.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Nvidia launches blueprints to help jump start AI projects
item.description: Give Nvidia credit, it’s not just talking up big ideas, it’s helping its customers achieve them. The vendor recently issued designs for AI factories after hyping up the idea for several months.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 7+ speedy steps to free up space on your Mac
item.description: Computers get clogged with digital “stuff” over time, and while we all like to think we’re good at managing all that D-detritus, there’s somehow never quite enough time to clean things up.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: ByteDance's Lemon8 gains traction amid TikTok ban threat as creators push the app
item.description: Hearing a lot about Lemon8 lately? You’re not the only one. Amid a looming U.S. ban on TikTok, content creators have been pushing the platform's sister app.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Preventing this insidious email forwarding scam that will drain your bank account
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says business email compromise scams are a serious threat, as shown by Teresa W.'s near loss of thousands of dollars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Japan links Chinese hacker MirrorFace to dozens of cyberattacks targeting security and tech data
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan on Wednesday linked more than 200 cyberattacks over the past five years targeting the country's national security and high technology data to a Chinese hacking group, MirrorFace, detailing their tactics and calling on government agencies and businesses to reinforce preventive meas
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Intro to Ktor: The HTTP server for Kotlin
item.description: Kotlin is a modern general-purpose language that brings together object-oriented and functional programming power in a sleek syntax. Ktor is the official HTTP server for Kotlin, leveraging Kotlin’s expressiveness for building endpoints and other server-side necessities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Meta eliminates fact-checking in latest bow to Trump
item.description: Meta chief executive officer Mark Zuckerberg on Tuesday announced changes to content moderation on Facebook and Instagram long sought by conservatives. Incoming President Donald Trump said the new approach was “probably” due to threats he made against the technology mogul.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, BARBARA ORTUTAY and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: WH national cyber director finalizing software liability proposals
item.description: Outgoing National Cyber Director Harry Coker says ONCD could also lead more efforts governmentwide on cybersecurity planning and response. The post WH national cyber director finalizing software liability proposals first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: Editor’s note: This is an archive of 2024 incidents as tracked by Cisco subsidiary ThousandEyes. For current trends, see the 2025 outage report and internet health check, which is updated weekly.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How adding capacity to a network could reduce IT costs
item.description: Finding an enterprise looking to spend more on network equipment is like finding gold while digging for worms for bait. Cost management used to be an option in enhancing profits, but these days it’s a mantra.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta's new board includes UFC boss Dana White, a familiar figure in Trump's orbit
item.description: Meta has appointed three new members to its board of directors, including Dana White, the president and CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship and a familiar figure in the orbit of incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: FBI's new warning about AI-driven scams that are after your cash
item.description: FBI warns that criminals are using generative AI to exploit individuals with deceptive tactics. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains their tactics and how to protect yourself from them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
